articles.title: Nippon Steel shares slump as debt outweighs fruits of U.S. Steel revival
South Korean and Japanese stocks lose momentum as tech stocks slump
Leveraged ETFs Sold $6 Billion of Korean Chips in Tuesday Rout
articles.summary: Leveraged exchange-traded funds tracking Samsung Electronics Co. or SK Hynix Inc. were likely forced to sell a combined $6 billion of the Korean chipmakers’ shares Tuesday to maintain leverage ratios, underscoring how such products can amplify market moves, according to Bloomberg Intelligence.

articles.title: Is the AI Bubble Bursting? Not Yet, Says Dan Farley
articles.summary: A tentative rebound in Asian equities following Tuesday’s global tech-led rout failed to hold as a fresh bout of selling hit the sector. State Street Investment Management's Dan Farley discusses whether the AI rally still has room to go. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Diksha Polymers share price hits 5% upper circuit after decent listing on BSE SME
articles.summary: Diksha Polymers shares were listed at  ₹114.50 apiece on the BSE SME, a premium of 2.23% to the issue price of  ₹112.00 per share. The SME stock touched a high of  ₹120.20 apiece, rising 5% from listing price and 7.32% from its issue price.

articles.title: S&P indexes reshuffle: Honeywell Aerospace replaces Conagra in S&P 500
A fintech company said its employee burned through $80,000 in tokens making a 'brainrot shooter game'
articles.summary: Slash is encouraging people to play the game so it can write it off as a "marketing expense."

articles.title: Amplify Energy (AMPY) officer adds 25,000 shares in open-market purchase
articles.summary: Amplify Energy Corp. officer James Frew purchased 25,000 shares of company common stock in an open-market transaction at $3.95 per share. Following this acquisition, Frew directly owns 216,859 shares of Amplify Energy common stock. This insider purchase is viewed with a positive sentiment, indicating confidence from the officer.

articles.title: 22nd Century Group (XXII) seeks reverse split and up to $30M in new equity
articles.summary: 22nd Century Group (XXII) is requesting stockholder approval for a reverse stock split at a ratio between 1-for-2 and 1-for-200 to maintain Nasdaq listing compliance. The company also seeks approval for 3,019,586 Inducement Warrants and two potential future financings: up to $20 million in convertible preferred stock with warrants and up to $10 million in common stock with warrants. These actions could significantly dilute existing shareholders but are presented as critical for accessing capital and supporting continued Nasdaq listing.

articles.title: Widepoint COO Todd Dzyak sells $150,000 in company stock
articles.summary: Widepoint COO Todd Dzyak sold 10,000 shares of company stock for $150,000 at $15.00 per share. This sale occurred while the stock was near its 52-week high after a 335% surge over the past year, and InvestingPro analysis suggests it is currently overvalued. Dzyak still holds 135,436 shares and options for an additional 9,714 shares.

articles.title: WidePoint (WYY) COO sells 10,000 shares, retains large stake
articles.summary: WidePoint Corp COO Todd Dzyak sold 10,000 shares of common stock at $15.00 per share. Following this transaction, Dzyak still directly holds 135,436 common shares and possesses a stock option to purchase an additional 9,714 shares at an exercise price of $1.82, expiring in August 2028. The stock options were granted under the company's 2008 Stock Incentive Plan and are set to vest on their third anniversary.

articles.title: Bristow Group To Acquire Berry Aviation For $105 Million
articles.summary: Bristow Group announced its definitive agreement to acquire Berry Aviation for $105 million in an all-cash transaction. This acquisition will expand Bristow’s Government Services platform by adding special mission aviation capabilities and long-standing relationships with U.S. defense and government customers. The deal is expected to enhance Bristow's earnings quality by increasing exposure to contracted government services and multi-mission aviation activities, and is projected to close in Q3 2026.

articles.title: Clay Craft India IPO listing: SME stock lists at a 4% premium over issue price, hits upper price band
articles.summary: Clay Craft India IPO listing: Clay Craft India shares listed at  ₹211 on the NSE SME against their issue price of  ₹203. The SME stock hit its upper price band of  ₹221.55, jumping over 9% with respect to the issue price.

articles.title: Tan France says he writes emails so his kids can see who they were growing up
articles.summary: Tan France says he got the idea from Kim Kardashian.

articles.title: Vedanta Aluminium share price gains as brokerages remain bullish; CLSA sees 18% upside
articles.summary: CLSA assigned an ‘Outperform’ rating on Vedanta Aluminium Metal shares, with a target price of  ₹540 apiece, based on 6x FY28CL EV/Ebitda. The target price implies an upside potential of 18% from Tuesday’s closing price.

articles.title: Knack Packaging IPO: Price band set at  ₹161-170 per share; check key dates, issue details
articles.summary: Knack Packaging's IPO ranges from  ₹161 to  ₹170, open for subscription from July 1-3. The lot size is 88 shares, with a distribution among QIBs, NIIs, and retail investors. Listing on BSE and NSE anticipated on July 8.

articles.title: I missed out on a pro basketball career by one cut. At 26, I bought an Irish pub with my mom instead.
articles.summary: While Jareb Dougherty was busy chasing his basketball dreams, his mom got a bartending job at an Irish pub.

articles.title: GeneDx (WGS) director adds 3,576 shares and 4,248 new RSUs in Form 4
articles.summary: GeneDx Holdings Corp. director Richard C. Pfenniger Jr. reported changes in his equity compensation, exercising 3,576 restricted stock units (RSUs) into Class A Common Stock. Following this, his direct holdings increased to 45,082 shares. Additionally, he received a new grant of 4,248 RSUs.

articles.title: Willow Lane Acquisition Corp (WLACU) Technical Analysis: Support, Resistance, Indicators & Moving Averages
articles.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of Willow Lane Acquisition Corp (WLACU), detailing its support and resistance levels, various technical indicators, and moving averages. It includes an overview of the company's financial health, valuation, earnings forecast, price momentum, and institutional confidence. The analysis concludes with a summary of buy and sell signals based on these technical factors.

articles.title: Warby Parker (NYSE: WRBY) CEO exercises 200K options, now holds 3.18M shares
articles.summary: Warby Parker Inc. co-CEO Neil Blumenthal exercised 200,000 stock options for Class B Common Stock at an exercise price of $3.83 per share on June 18, 2026. This transaction increased his direct holdings to 3,177,577 shares of Class B Common Stock, with an additional 510,759 stock options remaining. The Class B shares are convertible to Class A on a one-to-one basis and are also held indirectly through various trusts.

articles.title: Webster Financial clear analyst picture, shares trade steady on NYSE
articles.summary: Webster Financial (WBS) shares are trading steadily on the NYSE as analysts evaluate the bank's earnings and deposit franchise amid assumptions of higher interest rates. The stock closed around $76 on June 22, with analysts expecting stable mid-single-digit earnings growth. The bank recently beat EPS estimates, demonstrating its ability to manage net interest income and credit costs effectively.

articles.title: Urban Outfitters (URBN) up 3.6% since last earnings report: Can it continue? | FXStreet
articles.summary: Urban Outfitters (URBN) has seen a 3.6% increase in its stock price since its last earnings report, outperforming the S&P 500. The company reported strong Q1 fiscal 2027 results with earnings and revenues surpassing estimates, driven by momentum across Retail, Subscription, and Wholesale segments. Looking ahead, URBN anticipates continued sales growth for Q2 and fiscal year 2027, despite potential gross margin pressures from tariffs and fuel surcharges.

articles.title: China Unfazed by World’s Ire on Trade as Premier Touts Openness
articles.summary: Beijing’s No. 2 official played down worries about the disruption wrought by his country’s surging exports on the global economy, championing the benefits provided to the world by China’s development.

articles.title: Indian Tech’s Nifty Share Shrinks to Record Low on AI Worries
articles.summary: India’s software exporters are steadily losing their sway on the country’s stock market as concerns over artificial intelligence-led disruption trigger a prolonged selloff in the sector.

articles.title: SCWorx granted conditional Nasdaq listing continuation; must complete reverse split and 20-day $1.00 compliance
articles.summary: SCWorx (WORX) has received a conditional Nasdaq listing continuation. To maintain its listing, the company must perform a reverse stock split by August 3, 2026, and then achieve a closing bid price of $1.00 or higher for 20 consecutive trading days by August 28, 2026. Failure to meet these conditions will result in delisting, though shares would continue to trade on OTCQB.

articles.title: Apollo Caps Private Credit Fund Withdrawals After Requests Near 17%
articles.summary: Apollo Global Management is limiting withdrawals from its Apollo Debt Solutions private credit fund to 5% after investors requested to redeem 16.8% of their shares, an increase from 11% in the prior quarter. The firm expects gross outflows of $700 million for the quarter, significantly outweighing inflows. This move reflects broader investor stress in the semi-liquid private debt market, with other firms like Cliffwater and BlackRock also implementing redemption caps.

articles.title: F5 launches AI Security Platform to put security leaders in control of enterprise AI risk
articles.summary: F5 has launched its AI Security Platform, designed to provide CISOs with comprehensive visibility, governance, and protection for enterprise AI applications, models, agents, and APIs. The platform integrates the newly acquired SurePath AI, which specializes in network-based AI discovery and shadow AI detection. This initiative aims to address emerging AI-related security challenges by offering continuous protection and control across various deployment environments.

articles.title: Donald Trump shot down JD Vance’s proposal to send Indian troops as peacekeepers in Ukraine, claims new book
articles.summary: US Vice President JD Vance proposed deploying Indian troops as peacekeepers in Ukraine shortly after Donald Trump began his second term. This suggestion was made during a January 30 Oval Office meeting, where Trump dismissed the idea, stating India wouldn't fund such a mission.

articles.title: Direxion Daily Small Cap Bear 3X Shares declares quarterly distribution of $0.0377
articles.summary: The Direxion Daily Small Cap Bear 3X Shares (NYSEARCA: TZA) has announced its quarterly distribution of $0.0377 per share. This declaration comes as part of the fund's regular distribution schedule.

articles.title: Oaktree (TRMD) sells 3,509,701 TORM shares, retains 19.86% ownership stake
articles.summary: Oaktree-affiliated entities have filed an amendment to their Schedule 13D for TORM plc, indicating they now beneficially own 20,329,874 Class A shares, representing 19.86% of TORM's outstanding shares. This updated stake follows the sale of 3,509,701 Class A shares on June 22, 2026, at $29.08 per share in a block trade. The filing confirms Oaktree remains a major shareholder in TORM.

articles.title: Team, Inc. (NYSE: TISI) reshapes finance leadership with new CFO and severance terms
articles.summary: Team, Inc. (NYSE: TISI) announced a significant change in its finance leadership, with Nelson Haight stepping down as Executive Vice President and CFO on June 22, 2026. He will receive a severance package including $603,750 over 15 months, a prorated 2026 bonus, and immediate vesting of unvested time-based restricted stock units. Clinton Roeder has been appointed as the new Executive Vice President and CFO, effective the same date, with a base salary of $500,000, eligibility for a 75% target annual bonus, and equity awards valued at approximately $500,000 tied to the company's Adjusted EBITDA performance.

articles.title: TTAN (NASDAQ: TTAN) selling holders report Class A Common resales
articles.summary: ServiceTitan, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTAN) has reported proposed sales of Class A Common shares by selling holders via a Form 144 filing. The filing indicates recent cash sales on June 11, 2026, by Bessemer-related entities and 15 Angels II LLC, stemming from a private placement originally made on March 15, 2015. The reported transactions involved significant share amounts and proceeds, with the filing noting a neutral impact on the issuer as these are holder resales.

articles.title: Should Investors Buy Chipotle Stock on the Dip?
articles.summary: The restaurant industry is currently facing struggles, which are impacting Chipotle's growth. This has led to a dip in Chipotle's stock price. The article asks whether this dip presents a buying opportunity for investors.

articles.title: Gold rate crashes over 1% on MCX as US dollar index hits over 1-year high; experts highlight key levels to watch
articles.summary: Gold rate crashed by over 1% on MCX as the US dollar index jumped to a 1-year high. MCX gold August futures were 1.21% down at  ₹1,44,759 per 10 grams, while MCX silver July futures were 0.71% down at  ₹2,24,227 per kg around 9:10 am.

articles.title: Kennemore from Toll Brothers Inc. - new Alpharetta community with estate lots and $1 million pricing
articles.summary: Toll Brothers Inc. is launching Kennemore, a new luxury home community in Alpharetta, Georgia, featuring single-family homes on estate-sized lots with anticipated pricing starting around $1 million. This development targets high-income households and professionals seeking spacious homes and premium amenities in a desirable suburban location. The success of such new luxury communities is crucial for Toll Brothers' margin trends and stock performance on the NYSE.

articles.title: Bank of New York Mellon eliminates Series H preferred stock after redemption
articles.summary: The Bank of New York Mellon Corp (NYSE:BNY) has officially eliminated its Series H Noncumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock from its Restated Certificate of Incorporation. This action follows the redemption of all outstanding shares of the Series H Preferred Stock on the preceding Saturday. The change became effective upon filing a Certificate of Elimination with the Secretary of State of Delaware, while other preferred and common stocks remain listed on the NYSE.

articles.title: BSE to Marico - Jay Thakkar suggests 3 stocks to buy or sell for short-term in F&O segment
articles.summary: The Indian stock market may open flat amid mixed global cues and a significant selloff in tech stocks. The Nifty 50 closed below 24,000, marking a sideways to negative trend unless it regains this level. BSE, Marico, and Mankind Pharma show potential for movement.

articles.title: Why the NSE IPO may not create wealth like BSE’s did
articles.summary: The NSE IPO arrives after a decade-long boom in Indian markets that enriched existing shareholders. While the exchange remains dominant and highly profitable, matching the stellar returns delivered by BSE since 2017 may prove far tougher.

articles.title: Broadcom: Market’s Tantrum Around The AI Guidance Is Misguided (NASDAQ:AVGO)
articles.summary: This article argues that Broadcom (AVGO) is a strong buy with significant upside, despite recent market "tantrums" regarding its AI guidance. The author highlights Broadcom's secure AI revenue trajectory through multi-year contracts, near-monopoly in AI networking silicon, and underappreciated networking business as key drivers for durable growth. While acknowledging customer concentration and hyperscaler in-sourcing as risks, the author suggests a dollar-cost averaging approach due to potential near-term volatility.

articles.title: CSM Technologies IPO Day 1: Issue opens today. Check GMP, key dates, review. Apply or not?
articles.summary: CSM Technologies IPO is set from June 24-29, 2026, with an anchor investor raise of  ₹20 crore. The price band is  ₹107-113 per share, aimed at qualified institutional and retail investors. Listing expected on 2 July, with mixed brokerage views on the offering.

articles.title: Chinese Zinc Traders Eye Export Window to Clear Domestic Glut
articles.summary: Chinese zinc producers are eagerly waiting for exports to become more profitable to help clear a glut of the metal at home.

articles.title: Tutor Perini (NYSE: TPC) EVP exercises 26,203 RSUs and withholds 14,057 shares for taxes
articles.summary: Tutor Perini Corporation's Executive Vice President, William E. Jensen, exercised 26,203 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on June 19, 2026, converting them into common stock. To cover tax obligations, 14,057 shares were withheld at a value of $77.99 per share. Following these transactions, Jensen directly holds 49,369 shares of Tutor Perini common stock.

articles.title: Bank of New York Mellon eliminates Series H preferred stock after redemption
articles.summary: Bank of New York Mellon (NYSE:BNY) has officially eliminated its Series H Noncumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock from its Restated Certificate of Incorporation. This action follows the successful redemption of all outstanding shares of the Series H Preferred Stock on Saturday. The company's common stock and other preferred securities remain listed on the New York Stock Exchange.

articles.title: The UScellular Inseego MiFi 8000 from United States Cellular Corp. - 4G LTE hotspot built for road w
articles.summary: This article reviews the UScellular Inseego MiFi 8000, a 4G LTE mobile hotspot designed for travelers and small teams. It highlights the device's functionality, battery life, and ease of setup, positioning it as a practical alternative to smartphone tethering. The product contributes to UScellular's broader portfolio, impacting its stock story and regional network focus.

articles.title: 2x Valuation Gap: BIO vs. CRL — Who’s Wrong?
articles.summary: This article analyzes the significant valuation gap between Bio-Rad Laboratories (BIO) and Charles River Laboratories (CRL), two life sciences tools companies. While BIO trades at nearly twice the forward earnings multiple of CRL, the author argues that CRL appears to be the better investment due to its positive earnings trajectory and ongoing restructuring efforts, in contrast to BIO's headwinds and less impressive underlying earnings quality. The article concludes that given the 2x valuation discrepancy, Charles River is likely the mispriced and more favorable bet.

articles.title: India Lets NRIs Leverage Deposits to Draw Dollars
articles.summary: RBI swap covers only principal, not interest.

articles.title: Amylyx Pharmaceuticals to Present Data from First-in-Human, Dose-Ranging Phase 1 LUMINA Trial of AMX0114 in ALS at ENCALS 2026
articles.summary: Amylyx Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: AMLX) announced that it will present data from its Phase 1 LUMINA trial of AMX0114 for ALS at the ENCALS Meeting 2026. The initial data from Cohort 1 showed AMX0114 had no drug-related serious adverse events and no serious neurological adverse events, supporting continued evaluation at higher doses. The LUMINA study is a multinational, randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial evaluating the safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, and pharmacodynamics of AMX0114 in people with ALS, and Cohorts 1 and 2 are fully enrolled, with Cohort 3 currently enrolling.

articles.title: Insider Sell Alert: Adam Geller Sells Shares of Zscaler Inc (ZS)
articles.summary: Adam Geller, Chief Product Officer at Zscaler Inc (ZS), recently sold 2,817 shares of the company, reducing his holdings to 42,314 shares. This transaction is part of a trend over the last year where Zscaler has seen 28 insider sells and no insider buys. The stock, currently trading at $122.6, is considered a "Possible Value Trap, Think Twice" according to its GF Value of $285.62.

articles.title: Malaysia Central Bank Pledges Stronger Measures to Boost Inflows
articles.summary: Malaysia will intensify measures to encourage foreign-exchange inflows, including efforts to boost the repatriation and conversion of companies’ overseas earnings, the central bank said.

articles.title: Riskified director Shachar Erez sells $870,811 in shares By Investing.com
articles.summary: Shachar Erez, a director at Riskified (NASDAQ:RSKD), recently sold Class A Ordinary Shares worth $870,811 through Qumra Capital entities. These sales, conducted on June 18 and June 22, 2026, were part of a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan and involved 176,804 shares at prices between $4.85 and $5.00. The transactions occurred while the stock was near its 52-week low, and follow other company news including a new share repurchase authorization and mixed Q1 2026 earnings.
